items.author: 42-evey
items.name: hermes-plugins
items.summary: Plugin suite: Discord voice bridge with Gemini Live, WhatsApp bridge, goal management, inter-agent bridge, model selection, and cost control. Maintained by a frequent Hermes core contributor.

items.author: Romanescu11
items.name: hermes-skill-factory
items.summary: Meta-skill that auto-generates reusable skills from your workflows. Point it at a task you repeat and it creates a skill for it.

items.author: tlehman
items.name: litprog-skill
items.summary: Literate programming skill that works across Claude Code, OpenCode, and Hermes. Weaves code and prose into documented, executable notebooks.

items.author: Hmbown
items.name: Wizards-of-the-Ghosts
items.summary: Fantasy spell-themed skill pack. Wraps real development operations (refactoring, linting, testing) in a tabletop RPG interface.

items.author: Cranot
items.name: super-hermes
items.summary: Teaches Hermes to write its own analytical prompts. Adds a meta-reasoning layer where the agent generates better prompts for itself before executing tasks.

items.author: Lethe044
items.name: hermes-life-os
items.summary: Personal OS agent that detects daily patterns and learns your routines over time. Uses Hermes's memory system for lifestyle tracking, not just code.

items.author: Lethe044
items.name: hermes-incident-commander
items.summary: Autonomous SRE agent for production incident detection and self-healing. Monitors services, diagnoses failures, and applies fixes. Works well with Hermes's cron scheduling.

items.author: Yonkoo11
items.name: hermes-dojo
items.summary: Self-improvement system that monitors agent performance, identifies weak skills, and iterates on them automatically.

items.author: Alexeyisme
items.name: hermes-spotify-skill
items.summary: Spotify playback control for headless Linux and Raspberry Pi 4/5. Search, play, pause, skip, set volume, transfer between Spotify Connect devices. No daemon — Hermes writes spotipy snippets and runs them via `execute_code`. Works with raspotify for Pi-as-speaker. Tested on Raspberry Pi OS Lite Bookworm 64-bit. The only Linux-native Spotify skill in the ecosystem.

items.author: Lethe044
items.name: hermes-skill-marketplace
items.summary: Agent that writes, tests, and publishes new skills autonomously. Automates the skill creation and distribution lifecycle.

items.author: beiyuii
items.name: personal-api
items.summary: Turn your Obsidian vault into an identity layer any AI agent can read in under 30 seconds

items.author: adnw-vinc
items.name: hermes-nextcloud
items.summary: Self-hosted Nextcloud bridge — manage files (WebDAV), notes (Nextcloud Notes API), calendar/tasks (CalDAV), and contacts (CardDAV) from Hermes. App Password auth, configurable timezone, guided setup. Fills the self-hosted-cloud gap for Hermes users running their own infrastructure.

items.author: witt3rd
items.name: oh-my-hermes
items.summary: Multi-agent orchestration skills for Hermes inspired by `oh-my-claudecode` and rebuilt on Hermes primitives. Suite covers deep-research, deep-interview, `ralplan` (Planner → Architect → Critic consensus), `ralph` (verified execute → verify → iterate), `triage`, and `autopilot`, plus driver skills encoding the dispatcher's playbook. Composes end-to-end: research → interview → consensus plan → verified execution.

items.author: nmrtn
items.name: blacktea
items.summary: Spending controls for agents that pay online via x402. Holds over-limit payments for human approval in the chat, enforces a JSON policy, and audits every spend. Ships as an MCP server (pay, approve_payment, reject_payment, audit_query) plus an SDK and CLI.

items.author: duruonanni
items.name: hermes-skill-kit
items.summary: Three community-vetted skills: **feishu-document-api** (programmatic Feishu/Lark document creation), **feishu-response-format** (Feishu response formatting with 3 table schemes, Card JSON 2.0, Markdown compatibility, 53 tests), and **hermes-memory-maintenance** (MEMORY.md/USER.md audit and drift recovery). Codex-audited.

items.author: mosesman831
items.name: PolyBrain
items.summary: Multi-agent, multi-model orchestration skill that decomposes an objective into a JSON task plan, runs research and build subtasks in parallel, then synthesizes and verifies a final answer. Each role can use a different LLM/provider. Enforces strict citations and drops uncited claims.

items.author: Vincent-crypto-coder
items.name: tech-debt-management-skill
items.summary: Systematic technical debt management for Python projects. Automates scanning (pylint, radon, safety, bandit, flake8), prioritizes debt with a 4-dimension matrix, and generates executable refactoring plans with verification scripts.

items.author: 0xAaronx0
items.name: pingpong
items.summary: Spontaneous local leisure meetups: agent posts a pseudonymous, coarse-geo offer to a shared board; nearby agents match locally and negotiate place/time with double-opt-in before contact.

items.author: RobinBeraud
items.name: hermes-skills
items.summary: Growing skills library covering finance (FMP stock/crypto data), web (Firecrawl scrape/search), WhatsApp (WBizTool contacts), and marketing/SEO. Each skill follows standard SKILL.md format.

items.author: liuyunnb666
items.name: hermes-skills (liuyunnb666)
items.summary: Seven curated skills for Hermes: debugging, parallel dev, TDD, and UI workflows.

items.author: winterliu6
items.name: hermes-skills (winterliu6)
items.summary: Chinese-focused skills pack: **content-studio** (小红书/抖音/公众号), **security-newsletter** (weekly cybersecurity awareness emails), and **tech-ops-bot** (企业微信/飞书 IT ops with fault classification and web dashboard). Production use at Yaolai Cinema IT.

items.author: Moshe-ship
items.name: hurmoz
items.summary: Arabic-first skills pack — 63 skills across Islamic tools (prayer times, zakat, Quran), dialect-aware NLP, content, and travel. Install: `hermes skills tap add Moshe-ship/hurmoz`.

items.author: ilyautov
items.name: humanizer-ru
items.summary: Removes AI-writing tells from Russian text (bureaucratese, calques, ChatGPT/Claude fingerprints). 52 patterns, deterministic offline scanner. SKILL.md-compatible. MIT.

items.author: shunfeng8421
items.name: skill-packs
items.summary: Premium deployable skill packs for crypto monitoring — cross-exchange arb scanner, DeFi security scanner, and cross-chain tracker. Self-adaptive thresholds, zero paid API dependencies, runs on a $5 VPS.

items.author: tsol
items.name: hinge-projects
items.summary: Starts Vite projects, a Hinge editing overlay, Cloudflare tunnels, and Telegram control for phone-based development with Hermes. Early project; review the install script before running it.

items.author: AdvancingTitans
items.name: stock-analysis
items.summary: Python CLI and portable skill for A-share, Hong Kong, US stock, fund, and portfolio research. Produces Markdown reports and machine-readable evidence packs; research only, with no trading execution.

items.author: SuperNovae Studio
items.name: nika-agents
items.summary: Delegates repeatable work from Hermes to Nika workflows with static checks, cost caps, permits, and hash-chained execution traces. The integration skill is MIT; the Nika repository is AGPL-3.0.

items.author: Serge Bulaev
items.name: LinkedIn Skills
items.summary: Ten portable skills for drafting, reviewing, and planning LinkedIn content. MIT licensed and compatible with agentskills.io hosts, including Hermes.

items.author: zenlee123
items.name: routerbase-agent-skills
items.summary: Skills for RouterBase model routing and media generation. Requires RouterBase credentials; MIT licensed and still at its initial public revision.

items.author: okdk7788
items.name: skill-evolution
items.summary: GEPA-style measured evolution for learned agent skills, adapted from Hermes self-improvement ideas for Claude Code. MIT licensed, but still at its initial public revision.

items.author: ohad6k
items.name: ditto
items.summary: Mines local Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot session logs into a portable user profile that Hermes can load as a skill. Runs locally and is MIT licensed.

items.author: baoyu0
items.name: code-assembly-skill
items.summary: Search-first software assembly method for finding and composing existing tools before writing new code. Portable across Hermes, Claude Code, and Codex.

items.author: baoyu0
items.name: hermes-do-task-skill
items.summary: One-command workflow that plans a task, delegates execution, verifies the result, and writes a handoff. Early project with no published release.

items.author: wondelai
items.name: wondelai/skills
items.summary: Cross-platform agent skills for Claude Code and agentskills.io-compatible platforms.

items.author: therohitdas
items.name: youtube-skills
items.summary: Adds YouTube **search**, channel browsing, playlist extraction, and reliable transcripts on top of Hermes's built-in `youtube-content`. Built-in transcript fetch silently fails on VPS because YouTube blocks cloud IP ranges; this routes through TranscriptAPI's backend (15M+ transcripts/month) to stay unblocked. 12 sub-skills covering search → fetch → bulk extraction. Auto-invokes for creator lookups, topic research, and tutorials. The fix for "my Hermes can't watch YouTube on a $5 VPS."

items.author: mukul975
items.name: Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
items.summary: 753+ structured cybersecurity skills mapped to MITRE ATT&CK. 25k+ stars.

items.author: Chainlink
items.name: chainlink-agent-skills
items.summary: Official Chainlink agent skills on the agentskills.io spec. Oracle network data, CCIP, and smart contract interaction.

items.author: Black Forest Labs
items.name: black-forest-labs/skills
items.summary: Official FLUX model skills for image generation. First-party skills from the FLUX creators.

items.author: DougTrajano
items.name: pydantic-ai-skills
items.summary: Pydantic AI with agentskills.io support. Adds type-safe schema validation to agent skill inputs and outputs.

items.author: tiann
items.name: execplan-skill
items.summary: Manages complex, long-running task execution with proper lifecycle handling — progress tracking, checkpoints, and failure recovery.

items.author: ReinaMacCredy
items.name: maestro
items.summary: Skill orchestration with Conductor planning and Beads tracking. Structures multi-step skill execution into observable pipelines.

items.author: armelhbobdad
items.name: bmad-module-skill-forge
items.summary: Transforms repos and docs into agentskills.io-compliant skills. Input a codebase, output installable skills.

items.author: cablate
items.name: Agentic-MCP-Skill
items.summary: MCP client with agentskills.io validation. Bridges MCP tool servers with the skills standard.

items.author: KYC-rip
items.name: ripley-xmr-gateway
items.summary: Monero (XMR) blockchain gateway for agents. Enables private cryptocurrency transactions from agent workflows.

items.author: PederHP
items.name: skillsdotnet
items.summary: C# implementation of agentskills.io with MCP integration. .NET alternative to the Python/TypeScript SDKs.

items.author: TheColonyCC
items.name: colony-skill
items.summary: Collaborative intelligence platform where AI agents and humans post findings, discuss ideas, complete tasks, earn karma, and build reputation. Community hub at [thecolony.cc](https://thecolony.cc).

items.author: Merit-Systems
items.name: AgentCash
items.summary: Skill giving agents access to 300+ premium APIs and a wallet balance to pay for them through x402 or MPP. A fresh Hermes install with only AgentCash is actually powerful — from web scraping to image generation to email sending, all through one skill with free USDC for trying out.

items.author: Xquik-dev
items.name: x-twitter-scraper
items.summary: Typed X (Twitter) access via 43 narrow SKILL.md folders covering reads (search, timelines, mentions, trends, articles, bookmarks, for-you), writes (post, DM, follow, profile updates), bulk extraction (followers, communities, lists, spaces), AI composition (write-tweets, write-threads, optimize, going-viral), giveaways, monitors, and webhooks. No browser automation, no scraping — typed JSON in/out through the Xquik API. Fills the X gap for Hermes social workflows.

items.author: Agents365-ai
items.name: drawio-skill
items.summary: Generates draw.io diagrams from natural language and exports to PNG/SVG/PDF. SKILL.md format, works across Claude Code, OpenClaw, Hermes, Codex. Useful when an agent needs to communicate architecture or process visually without a separate design step. 5.8k+ stars.

items.author: nexu-io
items.name: open-design
items.summary: Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. 31 composable skills (web/mobile/decks/dashboards/documents) over 129 design systems (Linear, Stripe, Vercel, Notion, Apple, …) with image (gpt-image-2), video (Seedance 2.0, HyperFrames), and audio generation. Auto-detects 15 coding-agent CLIs from PATH and integrates with Hermes via ACP/JSON-RPC. BYOK proxy, sandboxed previews, can import Claude Design exports. 78k+ stars.

items.author: agentrhq
items.name: authsome
items.summary: Local OAuth2 and API credential broker for agents. Log in once via browser PKCE or device code, credentials live in a local encrypted vault, and a local proxy injects them at request time so raw keys never enter the agent's environment. 45 providers preconfigured (14 OAuth2, 31 API credentials) including GitHub, Google, OpenAI, Linear, Slack, Notion, Resend, and Stripe. Skill installs into Hermes with `hermes skills install agentrhq/authsome/skills/authsome`. MIT.

items.author: Outreach Magic
items.name: outreachmagic
items.summary: GTM pipeline agent that syncs Smartlead, Instantly, HeyReach, PlusVibe, EmailBison, Prosp, and Calendly into a local SQLite database your agent can query.

items.author: markoblogo
items.name: abvx-agent-skills
items.summary: Auditable cross-platform coding-agent skillpack for smaller diffs, evidence-led debugging, token control, browser verification, and reviewable `SKILL.md` workflows with static security audit.

items.author: Infrasity-Labs
items.name: dev-gtm-claude-skills
items.summary: Cross-platform agent skills for SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), AI discoverability, and developer marketing.

items.author: remoet-labs
items.name: remoet
items.summary: Job-search and career-discovery skill. Searches tech companies by actual tech stack, stars shortlisted companies, pulls jobs from that curated list, and reads/writes the developer profile. Backed by remote MCP with free tier.

items.author: Ales375
items.name: zooidfund
items.summary: Lets an agent discover, evaluate, and donate USDC on Base to humanitarian crowdfunding campaigns at [zooid.fund](https://zooid.fund). Public campaign browsing, peer-signal review, and direct wallet-to-creator transfers.

items.author: Longbridge Securities
items.name: longbridge
items.summary: Live financial market skill for US, HK, A-share, and Singapore markets. Real-time quotes, fundamentals, options chain, portfolio positions, institutional data, and news/SEC filings. Requires Longbridge account. 125+ companion skills.

items.author: MineBean
items.name: hermes-mine-bean
items.summary: Autonomous $BEAN mining skill for the MineBean 5×5 grid protocol on Base. Supports zero-cost `--no-agent` cron mode for unattended automation.

items.author: babyblueviper1
items.name: invinoveritas
items.summary: Portable agentskills.io skill + MCP recipe for pay-per-call tools over Bitcoin Lightning / USDC (x402). Governance `review` gate before irreversible actions, markets intelligence, sandboxed code execution, and agent-to-agent payments.

items.author: mmmikael
items.name: arelay-skills
items.summary: Deliver reports, Markdown, HTML, images, and PDFs via [Agent Relay](https://arelay.app) with optional end-to-end encryption. Works with hosted or self-hosted instances. MIT.

items.author: TinyHumans
items.name: tiny.place
items.summary: Agent-to-agent social network shipped as a portable skill: claim an @handle identity, get discovered in an open directory, message peers over Signal-protocol end-to-end encryption, and transact in USDC/SOL via x402. One SKILL.md runs on Hermes, OpenClaw, and any agentskills.io-compatible harness. GPL-3.0.

items.author: plur-ai
items.name: plur
items.summary: Shared memory layer for AI agents with open engram format (YAML). Useful for persistent learning patterns in Hermes workflows.

items.author: nativ3ai
items.name: hermes-payguard
items.summary: Safe USDC and x402 payment plugin. Lets Hermes send and receive payments with configurable spending limits and approval flows.

items.author: robbyczgw-cla
items.name: hermes-web-search-plus
items.summary: Multi-provider web search with intelligent routing across Serper, Tavily, Exa, and more. Replaces the built-in search with better result quality and source diversity.

items.author: FahrenheitResearch
items.name: hermes-weather-plugin
items.summary: Professional-grade weather plugin with NWS model imagery, NEXRAD radar, and meteorological calculations.

items.author: FahrenheitResearch
items.name: hermes-wxtrain-plugin
items.summary: ML pipeline plugin for building training datasets from HRRR/GFS/ERA5 weather models. Companion to the weather plugin for building weather ML pipelines.

items.author: anpicasso
items.name: hermes-plugin-chrome-profiles
items.summary: Switch browser tools between Chrome profiles via CDP. Useful for multi-account testing or browsing with different saved sessions.

items.author: raulvidis
items.name: hermes-cloudflare
items.summary: Cloudflare browser rendering plugin. Headless browsing through Cloudflare's infrastructure instead of local browser automation.

items.author: 42-evey
items.name: evey-bridge-plugin
items.summary: Claude Code plugin for bridging with Evey (hermes-agent). Lets Claude Code and Hermes share context and hand off tasks between each other.

items.author: Agent-Analytics
items.name: agent-analytics-hermes-plugin
items.summary: Native Signals dashboard tab for Hermes with read-only multi-project analytics, explicit timeframe, and theme-aware UI.

items.author: pingchesu
items.name: hermes-curator-evolver
items.summary: Evidence-driven companion to v0.12's built-in Curator. Observes tool/skill/session events into local SQLite, backfills existing `~/.hermes/sessions/*.json` history, generates reports and dry-run proposals, supports optional Qwen embedding + bge reranking for candidate ordering, and runs a guarded daily autorun loop that only appends low-risk evidence-backed notes (with backups and rollback manifests). Inspired by SkillClaw but adapted to Hermes-native plugin hooks with explicit model opt-ins and pinned-skill safety.

items.author: ogallotti
items.name: rtk-hermes
items.summary: Plugin that intercepts shell commands via `pre_tool_call` and rewrites output through [RTK](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk), compressing terminal output before it reaches the LLM context window. 60-90% token reduction on shell commands, 96.6% efficiency across 11M+ tokens processed. Zero config — auto-loads on gateway boot. Real benchmarks: `cargo test` 90-99%, `git log --stat` 87%, `ls -la` 78%.

items.author: willingning-coder
items.name: eagle-eye
items.summary: 5-layer intelligent skill routing engine. Narrows 50+ installed skills to top-5 candidates before each API call via Hard Triggers → FTS5 BM25 → Synonyms → Embeddings → RRF Fusion. Uses `pre_llm_call` hook; confidence gate allows "no match" as a valid result.

items.author: 8bit64k
items.name: cronalytics
items.summary: Cron cost and usage analytics. Hooks `on_session_end`, stores analytics in local SQLite, surfaces via dashboard tab, CLI, and agent skill for cron health diagnostics. Multi-language (en, zh, zh-TW, es).

items.author: gregoryhorn
items.name: hermes-drive-index
items.summary: Private local Google Drive full-text search index. Crawls selected folders into SQLite FTS5 and exposes `drive_index_search`, `drive_index_status`, and `drive_index_update` tools. Apache-2.0.

items.author: OLDBAI213
items.name: hermes-feishu-zh
items.summary: Community extension for Chinese Feishu display — replaces English UI labels, stabilizes Markdown via `post` format, and optionally adds `lark-cli-toolbox` with 12 Feishu tools. One-click install with backup/rollback.

items.author: mlinquan
items.name: hermes-snow-search
items.summary: Global memory retrieval layer — cross-session SQLite FTS5 search (~0.1s) across full message history, memory, and facts, with CJK/English auto-routing (trigram vs unicode61 tokenizers) and cross-device queries against a shared state.db. Also on [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/hermes-snow-search/).

items.author: mlinquan
items.name: hermes-bus-plugin
items.summary: Message bus integration plugin. Auto-starts bus daemon, registers session as endpoint, injects external messages via `pre_llm_call`. Provides `bus_send`, `bus_status`, and `bus_info` tools for cross-process agent coordination.

items.author: Saurav0989
items.name: hermes-motif
items.summary: Post-tool-call plugin that mines live execution traces for repeated sub-sequences and proposes them as evidence-backed micro-skills. n-gram extraction, arg abstraction, deduplication against existing skills.

items.author: Saurav0989
items.name: hermes-eval
items.summary: Skill regression testing and trajectory quality scoring. Catch skill drift before it propagates. Exports quality-filtered trajectories in Atropos RL format.

items.author: Capslockb
items.name: hermes-live-discord-agent-plugin
items.summary: Full-duplex Discord voice bridge to Gemini Multimodal Live — 40+ function tools, vision, per-user memory, mid-conversation delegation, and transcripts. Pure NumPy codec plumbing with hard-clear barge-in.

items.author: lingjiuu
items.name: hermes-dynamic-workflows
items.summary: Claude Code-style dynamic workflows for Hermes. Model writes sandboxed workflow scripts orchestrating subagents with `agent`, `parallel`, and `pipeline` — up to 1000 subagents, persisted/resumable runs, live dashboard.

items.author: scross01
items.name: custom-dangerous-patterns
items.summary: Add custom terminal command patterns requiring session approval before execution. Extends the standard approve-once/session/always/deny flow with `hermes custom-dangerous-patterns` CLI management.

items.author: redoracle
items.name: hermes-ops-kit
items.summary: Operational and security plugin: credential management, provider health checks, route diagnostics, MCP security auditing, key rotation, and usage/cost observability.

items.author: Basilisk Labs
items.name: agentplane-hermes-plugin
items.summary: External worker-lane plugin letting Hermes Kanban assignees matching `agentplane-*` spawn AgentPlane supervision instead of a Hermes profile.

items.author: Moshe-ship
items.name: khwarizmi-hermes-plugin
items.summary: Pre-LLM reliability preflight via `pre_llm_call`/`pre_tool_call`: restores implicit references, fails loud on contradictions, and gates tool calls against a constraint-driven allowlist. Part of the [Mizan](https://github.com/Moshe-ship/mizan) stack.

items.author: buihongduc132
items.name: hermes-plugin-slash-prompts
items.summary: Loads existing CLI-agent prompt files (OpenCode, Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) as Hermes slash commands. Auto-discovers six standard prompt directories, reads YAML-frontmatter/TOML/raw formats, and unifies the different argument-interpolation syntaxes (`$ARGUMENTS`, `$1`–`$9`, `{{args}}`) in one handler. MIT.

items.author: Paulo Nascimento
items.name: cron-status-alert
items.summary: Discord alert plugin for overdue Hermes cron jobs and failed deliveries, with recovery notifications and a `/cron-status` command. New and unadopted; MIT licensed.

items.author: Observer Protocol
items.name: hermes-gate
items.summary: Checks agent spending against signed delegation mandates before wallet actions. The current Hermes binding is bypassable by an agent that avoids the gate, and the repository does not declare a license.

items.author: Ken Pritchard
items.name: hermes-delegation-gate
items.summary: Adds human approval before `delegate_task` can spawn subagents, with a block mode for unattended runs. Requires a recent Hermes plugin-hook implementation; MIT licensed.

items.author: Rutger Clarke
items.name: Extracto
items.summary: Self-hosted web extraction plugin using local Trafilatura first and Jina Reader as a fallback for JavaScript-heavy pages. No API key is required; early first release.

items.author: adelinamart
items.name: RoBrain
items.summary: Self-hosted decision memory plugin that records rejected alternatives and resurfaces their reasons when an agent revisits them. Uses Postgres and can run with a local model; Apache-2.0.

items.author: ZoniBoy00
items.name: hermes-agent-abacus-ai
items.summary: Image-generation plugin for Abacus.AI models. Requires an Abacus.AI API key; MIT licensed and still at its initial public revision.

items.author: agentiker
items.name: agentiker plugin suite
items.summary: Three Hermes plugins for AST-aware code intelligence, repository scouting, and plan-following. The linked code-intel plugin is MIT licensed; each plugin installs separately.

items.author: amanning3390
items.name: hermeshub
items.summary: Browse, share, and install community skills for Hermes. Community hub for skill discovery, still early but growing.

items.author: chigwell
items.name: skilldock.io
items.summary: Registry of reusable AI skills compatible with OpenClaw, Claude Code, and Hermes. Established cross-platform skills marketplace with an active catalog.

items.author: pumanitro
items.name: Global Chat
items.summary: Cross-protocol agent discovery across MCP, A2A, and agents.txt. Searchable directory of 18K+ MCP servers and agents with a free agents.txt validator and MCP server for programmatic access.

items.author: CreatorSkills
items.name: CreatorSkills
items.summary: Curated marketplace of 30+ downloadable AI skills for content creators — YouTube scripting, sponsorship analysis, content repurposing, and audience growth. Uses the open SKILL.md format; skills install into Hermes, Claude Code, ChatGPT, and 20+ compatible platforms.

items.author: Bergside
items.name: TypeUI for Hermes
items.summary: Registry of design skills that give Hermes better context when building user interfaces. Component and style guidance sourced from an established design-system vendor. 1.4k+ stars.

items.author: Vectorize
items.name: hindsight
items.summary: Long-term memory layer for agents with retain/recall/reflect workflows. Integrates with Hermes via plugin or MCP and supports semantic, graph, and temporal retrieval.

items.author: elkimek
items.name: honcho-self-hosted
items.summary: Self-hosted Honcho memory backend setup for Hermes. Useful when you need stronger cross-session memory behavior with local control.

items.author: yantrikos
items.name: yantrikdb-hermes-plugin
items.summary: Hermes-native memory provider for [YantrikDB](https://github.com/yantrikos/yantrikdb-server). Self-maintaining memory: `think()` canonicalizes duplicates, `conflicts()` surfaces contradictions instead of overwriting silently, and every `recall()` result carries a `why_retrieved` reason list so ranking is explainable. Drop-in install into `plugins/memory/`, talks HTTP to a user-run Rust backend.

items.author: amanning3390
items.name: flowstate-qmd
items.summary: Anticipatory memory for AI agents with RAG and vector search. Pre-fetches relevant context before queries hit the agent.

items.author: AxDSan
items.name: Mnemosyne
items.summary: Local-first, sub-millisecond memory system built specifically for Hermes. SQLite + sqlite-vec hybrid search (50% vector / 30% FTS5 / 20% importance), BEAM tiered architecture (working / episodic / scratchpad), and a temporal knowledge graph (TripleStore) with time-aware fact invalidation. Native plugin (`hermes memory setup`, `hermes mnemosyne stats`), zero external dependencies, full docs at [docs.mnemosyne.site](https://docs.mnemosyne.site).

items.author: mem0ai
items.name: mem0
items.summary: Universal memory layer for AI agents. Multi-level memory (user, session, agent) with official Hermes integration.

items.author: plastic-labs
items.name: honcho
items.summary: Stateful memory library with asynchronous user-modeling reasoning. Builds richer user representations over time.

items.author: supermemoryai
items.name: supermemory
items.summary: Cloud and self-hosted memory layer. Single API for storing and querying agent memory.

items.author: stephenschoettler
items.name: hermes-lcm
items.summary: Lossless Context Management for Hermes — keeps session context from degrading in long runs.

items.author: yoloshii
items.name: ClawMem
items.summary: On-device memory layer for agents. Local-first with no external API dependencies.

items.author: garrytan
items.name: gbrain
items.summary: Opinionated brain layer for Hermes. Structured personal memory with categorization and retrieval.

items.author: keepnotes-ai
items.name: keepnotes
items.summary: Reflective memory layer. Stores and resurfaces notes at contextually relevant moments.

items.author: yepyhun
items.name: Brainstack
items.summary: Memory kernel stack for agents. Layered memory architecture with priority-based recall.

items.author: greyhaven-ai
items.name: autocontext
items.summary: Recursive self-improving context harness. Automatically curates and compresses context to keep it relevant.

items.author: sourcevault-ai
items.name: sourcevault-code-tools
items.summary: Private local code memory: semantic code search, exact file reads, and grounded repo Q&A with citations, all on-machine via a local SourceVault server. MIT.

items.author: codenamekt
items.name: hexus
items.summary: Postgres memory plugin and standalone MCP server. Local BERT (MiniLM-L6-v2) embeddings keep the memory hot path free of LLM and remote HTTP calls, with pgvector search, multi-agent storage, per-minion themes, and an async write queue. BSD-3-Clause.

items.author: penfieldlabs
items.name: hermes-penfield
items.summary: Memory provider for the Penfield knowledge graph — 16 tools, OAuth 2.1 device flow, stdlib-only, and the full MemoryProvider ABC (prefetch, pre-compress, system prompt block). Plugin is MIT, but it fronts the paid Penfield cloud service (no free tier).

items.author: TerminallyLazy
items.name: Tree Ring Memory
items.summary: Skill-level memory hygiene for local files: recall, capture, audit, consolidation, and intentional forgetting. Listed here as an approach rather than a drop-in Hermes memory provider.

items.author: outsourc-e
items.name: hermes-workspace
items.summary: Web-based workspace with chat, terminal, memory browser, skills manager, and inspector. The most complete GUI for Hermes. Built during the Nous Hackathon 2026.

items.author: dodo-reach
items.name: hermes-desktop
items.summary: Native macOS workspace for Hermes built around a direct, host-first SSH connection model, with a real embedded terminal, session browsing, canonical file editing, skills browsing, and usage metrics without extra gateway or daemon layers.

items.author: builderz-labs
items.name: mission-control
items.summary: Open-source dashboard for AI agent orchestration. Manage agent fleets, dispatch tasks, track costs, and coordinate multi-agent workflows. Self-hosted, SQLite-powered. 5.7k+ stars.

items.author: Tranquil-Flow
items.name: hermes-neurovision
items.summary: Terminal neurovisualizer with 42 animated themes. Decorative terminal overlays for agent activity.

items.author: roli-lpci
items.name: lintlang
items.summary: Static linter for AI agent configs and prompts with HERM v1.1 scoring. Catches config mistakes that silently degrade agent behavior.

items.author: 0xrsydn
items.name: nix-hermes-agent
items.summary: Nix package and NixOS module for Hermes. Fully reproducible deployments via Nix flakes.

items.author: 0xNyk
items.name: openclaw-to-hermes
items.summary: Community migration tool from OpenClaw to Hermes. Built when the native `hermes-migrate` had critical bugs. For Hermes v0.3.0+, prefer the native `hermes claw migrate` command — it now covers the full migration path.

items.author: unmodeled-tyler
items.name: vessel-browser
items.summary: AI-native Linux browser with MCP control and autonomous browsing. Full browser built for agent use, not a headless wrapper.

items.author: jo-inc
items.name: camofox-browser
items.summary: Stealth headless browser server with REST API — bypasses Cloudflare, bot detection, and anti-scraping. Drop-in Puppeteer/Playwright replacement that powers Hermes's own browser automation. 7.7k+ stars, MIT, used in production by [askjo.ai](https://askjo.ai). The right backend if your VPS-hosted Hermes keeps getting blocked.

items.author: pyrate-llama
items.name: hermes-ui
items.summary: Single-file glassmorphic web UI with SSE streaming, tool call visualization, activity panel, image analysis (Gemini Vision), session management, PDF export, skill browser, memory viewer, and mobile support. Python proxy server (stdlib only) on port 3333, no build step required.

items.author: sanchomuzax
items.name: hermes-webui
items.summary: Lightweight process monitoring and configuration dashboard. Simpler alternative to hermes-workspace, focused on ops.

items.author: EKKOLearnAI
items.name: Hermes Studio
items.summary: Vue 3 + TypeScript dashboard for Hermes with Backend-for-Frontend separation. Real-time streaming chat across multiple backends (local/Docker/SSH/Singularity), unified config for 8 messaging channels, token/cost analytics with 30-day trends, cron job scheduling, multi-profile gateway management, multi-agent group chat with @mention routing, and a WebSocket-backed embedded terminal. 9.1k+ stars.

items.author: 42-evey
items.name: evey-setup
items.summary: One-command setup for the full hermes-agent stack with free models and 29 plugins. Opinionated defaults that cover most use cases.

items.author: fkiene
items.name: llmtrim
items.summary: Local proxy in front of the model Hermes calls; compresses resent tool schemas, history, and MCP tool output before each request is sent. Quality-gated, so it never increases your bill. Also an MCP server, CLI, and library (Rust, Python, Ruby, Swift, Kotlin, JS/WASM). MPL-2.0. Same spirit as [rtk-hermes](https://github.com/ogallotti/rtk-hermes), but a transport-layer proxy rather than a native `pre_tool_call` plugin.

items.author: AMAP-ML
items.name: SkillClaw
items.summary: Open-source companion that auto-evolves, deduplicates, and improves your skill library from real session data. Adds a post-task evolution loop on top of Hermes's built-in skill creation. Native Hermes integration via `~/.hermes/skills`, safety flows (`skillclaw doctor hermes` / `skillclaw restore hermes`). Works across multiple devices and isolated skill silos. 705 stars, MIT licensed, active through 2026-04-17.

items.author: luoyuctl
items.name: agenttrace
items.summary: Local-first TUI/CLI for post-run agent session audits — cost/token spikes, tool failures, retry loops, latency gaps, health scores, anomalies, session-to-session diffs. No upload, no cloud, MIT. Companion SKILL.md (`agenttrace-session-audit`) packages the audit as an installable skill any host can run.

items.author: Socialpranker
items.name: agentburn
items.summary: Local read-only profiler showing where a Hermes instance burns money. Splits spend by source (cron, gateways, subagents, CLI), walks message logs for re-read loops and retry patterns, and proposes paste-ready config fixes. Python stdlib only, `uvx agentburn`, MIT.

items.author: drakulavich
items.name: kesha-voice-kit
items.summary: Local-first CLI voice backend. STT in 25 languages and TTS via Hermes command providers with no API keys. Plugs into `HERMES_LOCAL_STT_COMMAND` and `tts.providers.<name>.type: command`.

items.author: fresh-claw
items.name: xiaoma-hermes-zh-cn
items.summary: Chinese localization and onboarding package. One-command installer applies zh-CN UI text patches, gateway prompts, and pairing messages for Hermes 0.14.x/0.13.x.

items.author: Atlas Cloud
items.name: Atlas Cloud
items.summary: OpenAI-compatible API gateway for running Hermes workflows against multiple model families — useful for comparing skill behavior across providers without reworking integrations.

items.author: mlinquan
items.name: hermes-bus
items.summary: Generic Unix socket message bus transport — 4-byte framing, endpoint registration, heartbeat keep-alive, auto-reconnect. Pairs with hermes-bus-plugin and hermes-notify.

items.author: mlinquan
items.name: hermes-notify
items.summary: Config-driven notification router — YAML rule matching by message type, context injection, audio playback, and tmux notification sender.

items.author: Moshe-ship
items.name: arabic-agent-eval
items.summary: Dialect-split Arabic function-calling benchmark (51 items, 5 dialects) with public [leaderboard](https://huggingface.co/spaces/Mosescreates/arabic-agent-eval-leaderboard).

items.author: xmbshwll
items.name: hermes-agent-docker
items.summary: Minimal Docker sandbox image for Hermes. Pull, run, done.

items.author: Crustocean
items.name: hermes-agent-template
items.summary: Production-ready Docker image for cloud Hermes deployments on Crustocean. Infrastructure wiring pre-configured.

items.author: JackTheGit
items.name: hermes-autonomous-server
items.summary: Headless Hermes deployment with systemd and cron on Linux servers. Runs unattended.

items.author: solomon2773
items.name: Nora
items.summary: Self-hosted control plane for Hermes and OpenClaw fleets on Docker or Kubernetes. Includes lifecycle controls, logs, terminal and file access, RBAC, encrypted provider secrets, monitoring, REST, CLI, and MCP interfaces. Apache-2.0.

items.author: raulvidis
items.name: hermes-android
items.summary: Android device bridge with a full Python toolset. Lets Hermes interact with and control Android devices.

items.author: teknium1
items.name: hermes-miniverse
items.summary: Bridge to Miniverse pixel worlds. By a Nous Research co-founder.

items.author: screenpipe
items.name: screenpipe
items.summary: Local-first screen and audio capture that gives Hermes long-term memory of what you've seen, said, and heard. Connects over MCP (`npx -y screenpipe-mcp`, stdio or HTTP) with tools for search, activity summaries, and meeting detection. Fully on-device.

items.author: 1clawAI
items.name: 1claw-hermes
items.summary: TypeScript integration bringing [1Claw](https://1claw.xyz) to Hermes — MCP-based secret fetching from an HSM-backed vault, a [Shroud](https://docs.1claw.xyz/docs/guides/shroud) TEE LLM-proxy sidecar that redacts secrets/PII and blocks prompt injection before prompts reach the model provider, per-subagent identities, and the Intents API for keyless on-chain signing. Hermes agents get just-in-time, scoped, revocable credentials without keys ever touching the agent context.

items.author: marlandoj
items.name: zouroboros-swarm-executors
items.summary: Local executor bridge for Claude Code + Hermes integration. Enables task handoff between both agents.

items.author: Crustocean
items.name: reina
items.summary: Autonomous AI agent for the Crustocean platform. Deep integration of Hermes into Crustocean's product.

items.author: Rainhoole
items.name: hermes-agent-acp-skill
items.summary: Multi-agent delegation skill bridging Hermes, Codex, and Claude Code. Routes subtasks to the best-suited agent automatically.

items.author: gizdusum
items.name: hermes-blockchain-oracle
items.summary: Solana blockchain intelligence MCP server. Provides on-chain analytics and wallet data to Hermes via MCP.

items.author: Ridwannurudeen
items.name: hermes-council
items.summary: Adversarial multi-perspective council MCP server. Multiple AI viewpoints debate before the agent commits to a decision.

items.author: unitedideas
items.name: Not Human Search
items.summary: MCP server for discovering other MCP servers. Indexes 8,600+ agent-friendly sites with agentic scoring, category filters, and live JSON-RPC verification. Wire it into Hermes via MCP to let the agent find and evaluate new tools to integrate on its own. Live at [nothumansearch.ai](https://nothumansearch.ai).

items.author: Hmbown
items.name: NemoHermes
items.summary: NVIDIA capability registry and Spark-aware routing layer. Routes compute-heavy tasks to available GPU infrastructure.

items.author: Andrew-Girgis
items.name: microsoft-workspace-skill
items.summary: Full Outlook/Hotmail/Microsoft 365 integration via Microsoft Graph API. Email, calendar, contacts, user profile, and free/busy scheduling. OAuth2 with auto-refresh. Includes preview-before-send pattern that prevents shell `$` variable mangling — a real pain point when agents compose emails with dollar amounts.

items.author: AIVane Labs
items.name: agent-android
items.summary: LAN-first Android control for Hermes over WiFi — no USB, ADB, or root required once the AIVane service is running. Supports health checks, app listing/launching, UI tree inspection, taps, text input, swipes, navigation, screenshots, and inspect→act→smoke flows. Explicit safety boundaries: only connects to user-provided device URLs.

items.author: mrpeter2025
items.name: clawsocial-hermes-plugin
items.summary: Social discovery network plugin — helps users find and connect with people sharing their interests through their Hermes agent. Features semantic interest matching, real-time WebSocket messaging, shareable profile cards, local and web inbox, and 4 notification modes. All actions require explicit user request. Bilingual (English + Chinese), compatible with OpenClaw version.

items.author: Swih
items.name: mistral-mcp
items.summary: MCP server (stdio + Streamable HTTP) wrapping the full Mistral AI surface — chat, embeddings, vision, OCR, Voxtral audio (transcribe/speak), Codestral FIM, agents, moderation, classification, files, batch. 22 tools, 2 live resources, listed on the Official MCP Registry. Lets a Hermes user keep their primary reasoning model and route OCR / audio / FIM / classification to Mistral's specialized endpoints (free Experiment tier offers 1B tokens/month).

items.author: dannyshmueli
items.name: Hermes Console
items.summary: Obsidian integration for Hermes Agent. Runs Hermes in a tabbed terminal inside Obsidian and bridges selected-note/cursor context through a local companion plugin, with background status alerts when agent runs finish.

items.author: Wordbricks
items.name: onequery-cli
items.summary: Governed read-only SQL access for agents. Routes through centralized credentials, source capability checks, query validation, row limits, and audit logs instead of direct database credentials. Apache-2.0.

items.author: agentchatme
items.name: agentchat-hermes
items.summary: Connects Hermes to [AgentChat](https://agentchat.me) peer-to-peer agent messaging. WebSocket daemon with leader-lock singleton, 38 typed tools, and SOUL.md identity anchoring. Silence is a first-class outcome.

items.author: agentchatme
items.name: AgentChat Universal Skill
items.summary: Self-contained Markdown skill for autonomous AgentChat onboarding via `curl` and Hermes's `cronjob` tool — no human intervention needed.

items.author: sneakyfree
items.name: windy-access
items.summary: One-command pairing for the Windy ecosystem. Auto-detects runtime, configures `~/.hermes/.env`, and gives the agent a `@windymail.ai` mailbox, Matrix chat identity, and OpenAI-compatible LLM access. `windy disconnect --yes` reverses cleanly.

items.author: Moshe-ship
items.name: wasl
items.summary: Arabic MCP server — 30 tools (prayer times, Quran, Hijri dates, Arabic NLP). `pip install wasl-mcp`.

items.author: ypnpt6ysmw-bit
items.name: agy-cli bridge
items.summary: Integrates Google Antigravity CLI and Antigravity Pro subscription credentials with Hermes via macOS Keychain OAuth — no AI Studio API keys needed.

items.author: plagtech
items.name: Spraay x402 Gateway
items.summary: Batch-pay recipients in a single on-chain transaction across 13+ chains. 151 paid primitives via x402 micropayment protocol. Available as [Hermes skill](https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent/pull/49716) or [MCP server](https://smithery.ai/servers/Plagtech/Spraay-x402-mcp).

items.author: DIALLOUBE-RESEARCH
items.name: hypernatt-terminal
items.summary: [HyperNatt](https://hypernatt.com) BTC decision terminal MCP for agents (9 tools) — vault-backed BTC/USDC signals, MM trap/hunt, liq radar, and Li.Fi cross-chain swap. Paid per-call via x402 (Base + Solana). MCP at `https://hypernatt.com/mcp/protocol` · [quickstart](https://github.com/DIALLOUBE-RESEARCH/hypernatt-terminal/blob/main/docs/quickstart.md).

items.author: zero-sq
items.name: space0
items.summary: Shared 3D voxel world body for agents with spatial memory, co-presence, and persistent identity across sessions. agentskills.io skill + MCP server.

items.author: jau123
items.name: MeiGen-AI-Design-MCP
items.summary: Stdio MCP server for AI image + video generation across 9 leading models (GPT Image 2, Nanobanana 2, Seedream 5.0, Midjourney V8.1, Flux 2 Klein, Seedance 2.0, Happyhorse 1.0, Veo 3.1) plus local ComfyUI. Three backend modes: MeiGen cloud, any OpenAI-compatible API (BYOK), or fully offline ComfyUI. README ships a tested Hermes `mcp_servers` YAML with the timeout overrides needed for video gen workflows. SSRF-hardened, R2 uploads auto-expire after 24h. 1.5k+ stars.

items.author: DanielLi202
items.name: hermes-tag
items.summary: Context-selection layer for Feishu/Lark and Slack groups: @-mention the agent and it replies in-thread from bounded per-chat memory plus selected evidence — replies only when mentioned, no full-history RAG, no ambient auto-answer. Admin audit and lifecycle controls with an `enabled_chats` allowlist. MIT, bilingual docs with real demo recordings.

items.author: ahmdngi
items.name: consensus-mcp-hermes
items.summary: Setup guide connecting 200M+ peer-reviewed research papers to Hermes via the [Consensus](https://consensus.app) MCP server — OAuth walkthrough for headless environments, mcp-remote bridge config, and the full search tool parameter reference.

items.author: resemble-ai
items.name: resemble-ai/detect-skill
items.summary: Deepfake detection and media safety for agents. Detects AI-generated audio, images, video, and text; traces audio source (ElevenLabs, Resemble, etc.); applies invisible watermarks for provenance tracking; verifies speaker identity (Beta). Powered by [Resemble AI](https://resemble.ai). Core principle: never declare media real or fake without a completed detection result.

items.author: Abruptive
items.name: Ankh.md
items.summary: TAW Agent x Hermes multi-agent swarm framework. Coordinates multiple agents with shared goals and distributed task execution.

items.author: runtimenoteslabs
items.name: gladiator
items.summary: Two autonomous AI companies compete for GitHub stars. Hackathon project exploring autonomous agent competition dynamics.

items.author: supermodeltools
items.name: bigiron
items.summary: AI-native SDLC with Hermes and Supermodel code graph. Full software development lifecycle driven by coordinated agents.

items.author: 1ilkhamov
items.name: opencode-hermes-multiagent
items.summary: 17 specialized agents for OpenCode AI. Each agent has a defined role and they communicate through structured interfaces.

items.author: Ikalus1988
items.name: MisakaNet
items.summary: Git-based distributed swarm memory. When one agent solves a problem, every node learns via shared markdown lessons synced through GitHub Issues. 104+ lessons, 21+ registered nodes. Zero infrastructure beyond GitHub.

items.author: bryercowan
items.name: hermes-embodied
items.summary: Self-improving robotics via VLA model fine-tuning. Applies the Hermes learning loop to physical robot control. Nous Hackathon project.

items.author: bigph00t
items.name: hermescraft
items.summary: Embodied AI companion for Minecraft with persistent memory. Tracks inventory, learns building preferences, and retains context across sessions.

items.author: Snehal707
items.name: Hermes-mars-rover
items.summary: Mars rover simulator with ROS2 and Gazebo. Uses Hermes's skill creation loop to improve navigation over time.

items.author: rodmarkun
items.name: anihermes
items.summary: Local anime server and tracker with natural language interface. Browse, track, and get recommendations via conversation.

items.author: Christabel337
items.name: job-scout-agent
items.summary: Autonomous job hunting agent. Searches listings, tracks applications, and manages the job search pipeline.

items.author: JackTheGit
items.name: hermes-ai-infrastructure-monitoring-toolkit
items.summary: Infrastructure monitoring, cost forecasting, and alerting via Telegram. Uses cron scheduling for continuous checks.

items.author: Ridwannurudeen
items.name: hermes-genesis
items.summary: Autonomous living world engine with procedural generation. Creates and maintains virtual worlds that grow in complexity over time.

items.author: Lethe044
items.name: hermes-legal
items.summary: Contract risk analysis with English and Turkish support. Identifies risky clauses and summarizes legal obligations.

items.author: dlkakbs
items.name: hermes-startup-architect
items.summary: Generates investor-ready kits from startup ideas — market analysis, pitch deck, and financial projections.

items.author: hxsteric
items.name: mercury
items.summary: Multi-chain blockchain cash flow analyzer with WebGL dashboard. On-chain forensics and flow visualization.

items.author: setasoma
items.name: mycodo-hermes-skill
items.summary: Phase-aware IoT decision engine for autonomous mushroom cultivation on Raspberry Pi. Reads sensors via Mycodo/InfluxDB, detects growth phases, and fires relay commands with safety guards. Tested through a complete Lion's Mane fruiting cycle.

items.author: bbolinger
items.name: snapmaker-u1-toolkit
items.summary: Safety-staged headless slicing for the Snapmaker U1 multi-tool 3D printer over Moonraker/Klipper LAN. 10-step staged operator flow with camera-gated print starts — the gate caught a wrong-extruder G-code before any heat command in live testing. Ships a bundled Hermes skill installable via `hermes skills install bbolinger/snapmaker-u1-toolkit/skills/3d-printer-slicing-automation`. MIT.

items.author: Currents
items.name: Currents News API Skills
items.summary: Installable news search and reading skills with server-side credentials, parameter validation, caching, and rate-limit guidance. Requires a Currents API key; MIT licensed.

items.author: Internet Court
items.name: Internet Court
items.summary: MIT-licensed portable skill for delegated permissions, x402 payments, escrow, revocation, and dispute workflows in agent-to-agent commerce.

items.author: longsizhuo
items.name: openInvest
items.summary: Self-hosted investment research application that runs an LLM committee and exposes agentskills.io and MCP interfaces. MIT licensed; research output is not financial advice.

items.author: avansaber
items.name: erpclaw
items.summary: Self-hosted ERP core with accounting, inventory, sales, purchasing, HR, payroll, and an agent action layer. GPL-3.0 and compatible with Hermes through its skill interface.

items.author: nativ3ai
items.name: hermes-agent-camel
items.summary: Hermes with integrated CaMeL trust boundaries. Adds formal trust verification to the agent loop for safety-critical deployments.

items.author: jasperan
items.name: orahermes-agent
items.summary: Oracle AI Agent Harness — OCI GenAI and Oracle 26ai integration. Enterprise on-ramp for Oracle environments.

items.author: Kamino
items.name: Hermes Alpha
items.summary: Cloud-deployed security-research experiment built from stock Hermes plus a `SOUL.md`. An Overseer agent on Fly.io creates disposable Hunter agents for bug-bounty work and records lessons in Elephantasm. The project calls itself an experiment in progress; its last code push was March 16, 2026, and it has no releases.

items.author: beardthelion
items.name: hermes-skill-distillation
items.summary: Generates agentic training trajectories from real-world tasks. Hackathon project for producing fine-tuning data at scale.

items.author: mudrii
items.name: hermes-agent-docs
items.summary: Comprehensive community documentation for Hermes Agent. Covers v0.2.0 in detail, useful supplement to the official docs for deployment patterns.

items.author: metantonio
items.name: hermes-wsl-ubuntu
items.summary: Step-by-step WSL2 Ubuntu setup instructions for running Hermes on Windows.

items.author: martymcenroe
items.name: HermesWiki
items.summary: Community-maintained wiki with practical patterns and deployment advice for building autonomous agents with Hermes.

source.claim_boundary: Static catalog parsed from upstream README. This is not plugin installation, runtime load, safety review, or endorsement evidence.
